rag_rules: Repair only validator-reported issues in the current component's annex
Use only visible identifiers from the current component and its features
Do not introduce new subcomponents or connections to fix AGREE errors
Delete invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture to fix unresolved references
generic_rules: Use only int, real, and bool for AGREE scalar types
Ensure guarantee expressions have valid types matching their declarations
Compare expressions should be of type bool
Integer literals and arithmetic should be of type int
Real literals and arithmetic should be of type real
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assign only for implementation-level bindings to existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Place guarantees in component type annexes for type-level contracts
Use eq helpers for reusable expressions in the same annex
Use const for named constants in the same annex
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code
Do not introduce new subcomponents or connections to fix AGREE errors
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about missing subcomponents
AGREE validator diagnostics about unresolved connection ends
